items.title: Russell proud of resilience after string of problems
items.content: <article>George Russell says he has had to be "the most resilient I've ever been" to cope with the string of problems that have affected his title challenge.</article>

items.title: Alonso optimistic about Aston Martin upgrade - will it decide his future?
items.content: <article>Fernando Alonso says he is "optimistic" about the major upgrade Aston Martin are introducing at the Hungarian Grand Prix.</article>

items.title: How to follow Hungarian Grand Prix on the BBC
items.content: <article>All the key BBC coverage details for the Hungarian Grand Prix at the Hunugaroring, from 24-26 July.</article>

items.title: Why was Hamilton penalised but not Leclerc? - F1 Q&A
items.content: <article>BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your latest questions before the Hungarian Grand Prix.</article>

items.title: The Chequered Flag Podcast
items.content: <article>Harry Benjamin, Sam Bird and Rebecca Clancy assess what it means for the title fight.</article>

items.title: Russell 'numb to disappointment' after bitter blow to title hopes
items.content: <article>George Russell crashing out at Spa and falling 50 points behind team-mate Kimi Antonelli is a bitter blow to the Briton, writes Andrew Benson.</article>

items.title: Is Verstappen to Mercedes a likely move?
items.content: <article>BBC Chequered Flag podcast experts Sam Bird and Rebecca Clancy discuss the liklihood of Red Bull's Max Verstappen making a move to rivals Mercedes.</article>

items.title: Title race would be 'done and dusted' without Mercedes reliability issues
items.content: <article>BBC F1 commentator Harry Benjamin is joined by Sam Bird and Rebecca Clancy to discuss Kimi Antonelli's victory at the Belgian Grand Prix.</article>

items.title: Antonelli wins to extend lead after Russell crashes out
items.content: <article>Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli re-establishes a comfortable championship lead with victory in the Belgian Grand Prix while team-mate George Russell crashes out.</article>

items.title: Antonelli near-perfect but too much drama for Hamilton - driver ratings
items.content: <article>BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the Belgian Grand Prix.</article>

items.title: Mercedes driver scout Lagrue joining Red Bull
items.content: <article>The Mercedes driver scout involved in discovering Kimi Antonelli is leaving the team to join rivals Red Bull.</article>

items.title: Russell 'infuriated' by straight-line issue that leaves him 'powerless'
items.content: <article>George Russell says a "serious issue" with the straight-line performance of his Mercedes is making his title fight with Kimi Antonelli "impossible".</article>

items.title: Antonelli takes Belgium pole from Verstappen
items.content: <article>Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli takes pole position at the Belgian Grand Prix, leaving team-mate George Russell trailing in fourth.</article>

items.title: Antonelli tops FP2 as Gasly crashes heavily at Spa
items.content: <article>Alpine's Pierre causes a red flag with a heavy crash in Friday practice at the Belgian Grand Prix as Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli set out his stall for the weekend with fastest time.</article>

items.title: Norris to have 10-place grid penalty in Belgium
items.content: <article>Lando Norris will have a 10-place grid penalty at the Belgian Grand Prix as a result of exceeding the permitted number of engine parts.</article>

items.title: Red Bull to change wing after Verstappen crashes
items.content: <article>Red Bull are reverting to a conventional rear wing for the Belgian Grand Prix following high-speed crashes for Max Verstappen in the previous two races.</article>

items.title: Could it work if Verstappen wanted to go to McLaren? F1 Q&A
items.content: <article>BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your latest questions before the Belgian Grand Prix at Spa-Francorchamps.</article>

items.title: The personal story of a dad who took his autistic son to the British Grand Prix
items.content: <article>My autistic son loves Formula 1 - and Silverstone have made it viable for him to go and watch it live.</article>

items.title: Safety car software error 'frustrating'
items.content: <article>Rosanna Tenant, Harry Benjamin and former Formula 1 world champion Damon Hill discuss the end to the British Grand Prix as a 'software error' led people to believe there would be one final lap of racing after a late safety car.</article>

items.title: Safety car decisive again in confusing end to chaotic race
items.content: <article>The safety car staying out might have been an unsatisfactory way to end the British Grand Prix but this time the rules were followed, writes Andrew Benson.</article>

items.title: Red Bull wing failure 'super-dangerous' - Verstappen
items.content: <article>Max Verstappen says the rear wing failure on his Red Bull that caused him to crash at two consecutive grands prix was "super-dangerous".</article>

items.title: The Chequered Flag Podcast
items.content: <article>Damon Hill joins Rosanna Tennant and Harry Benjamin to reflect on the British Grand Prix.</article>

items.title: Strong weekend for Lindblad and Leclerc composed - driver ratings
items.content: <article>BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the British Grand Prix.</article>

items.title: Leclerc wins dramatic race from Russell and Hamilton
items.content: <article>Charles Leclerc wins an incident-packed British Grand Prix from George Russell in which both Kimi Antonelli and Max Verstappen failed to score points.</article>

items.title: British Grand Prix breaks F1 attendance record
items.content: <article>A record-breaking 564,000 fans attend across the four-day race event.</article>

items.title: Antonelli beats Leclerc & Hamilton to Silverstone pole
items.content: <article>Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli takes pole position for the British Grand Prix, beating the Ferraris and team-mate George Russell.</article>

items.title: Antonelli passes Hamilton to win Silverstone sprint
items.content: <article>Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli overtakes Lewis Hamilton to win an action-packed sprint race at the British Grand Prix.</article>

items.title: Ollie Bearman on catching up to Kimi Antonelli - and Harry Kane's F1 potential
items.content: <article>The British driver makes his return to his home Grand Prix this weekend</article>

items.title: Hamilton takes pole for Silverstone sprint race
items.content: <article>Ferrari's Lewis Hamilton pips Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli to a stunning pole position for the sprint race at the British Grand Prix.</article>

items.title: Hamilton fastest in Silverstone practice session
items.content: <article>Ferrari's Lewis Hamilton leads the way in practice at the British Grand Prix before sprint qualifying later on Friday.</article>

items.title: F1: Chequered Flag
items.content: <article>Andrew Benson sits down with reigning world champion Lando Norris</article>

items.title: Norris 'happy I have the pain of this year for the glory of last'
items.content: <article>Lando Norris tells BBC Sport he is "paying the price" for the effort that brought him the 2025 title - and why McLaren would be a "different vibe" for Max Verstappen.</article>

items.title: Russell's win showed 'maturity and experience'
items.content: <article>BBC F1 correspondent Andrew Benson says the manner of George Russell's victory in the Austrian Grand Prix will the give the Mercedes driver confidence heading into his home race at Silverstone.</article>

items.title: The Chequered Flag Podcast
items.content: <article>Harry Benjamin is joined by Sam Bird & Andrew Benson to review the Austrian Grand Prix.</article>
